reviews.text: Due to circumstances, I extended my stay and thought it would be nice to stay at the Hilton Saigon, so I made a reservation and requested a room on a higher floor. I was given a twin bed room on the 36th floor with a view of the Saigon River. It had a large TV, a Nespresso machine, a bathtub, and a separate shower room that you could sit in, with a spacious closet that was very practical. Unfortunately, there was no washlet, and there was no hand shower either. I noticed that the voltage in the building seemed weak at times, causing the lights to flicker momentarily. Breakfast was a traditional American breakfast with a wide variety, and coffee and drinks were brought to you after you were seated. I thought the price could be a bit more reasonable.

reviews.title: A hotel with extremely poor value for money.
reviews.text:
The prices of five-star hotels in Ho Chi Minh City seem to be continuously rising. Considering the cost of living in Vietnam and specifically in Ho Chi Minh, the prices of hotels, especially five-star hotels, are almost on par with Tokyo. Even if the hotel was built relatively recently, a rate exceeding $300 per night, including taxes, is the norm. Even though I booked a room that allowed access to the executive lounge, it's still expensive. On the first day, I arrived just before the lounge’s usage hours were about to end, and the staff kindly set aside some food for me to eat. The service was good, and the food was just okay. Breakfast can be taken at the buffet restaurant instead of the lounge, and the lounge opens at 1 PM. Huh...? 1 PM...?
That’s right... I checked in late yesterday, and due to my schedule, which required me to move immediately after checking out today, I was unable to utilize the lounge. There was no notice about the lounge operation when I made my reservation, and I couldn't find it on the hotel’s website. I even, out of frustration, asked ChatGPT, but I was told that I needed to call the hotel for information... Haha. Ultimately, after checking out at 12:30 PM (it had clearly indicated a 1 PM checkout when I booked, but I received a call at 12:25 from a staff member telling me to check out), I waited 30 minutes for the lounge to open. Since it was after checkout, the staff had to escort me to enter the lounge. Sigh...
Once I entered the lounge and tried to scan the available food... Huh? Is this right...? Water, juice, coffee... that was all there was. Sigh... I wonder what time I would need to arrive to forget about my hunger...
In the end, I had a glass of orange juice and a cup of coffee... and then left. I was headed back out onto the long road for work. The hotel has a good location, a nice view, and friendly staff... but it is an extremely poor value hotel.
reviews.response:
Dear SEUNGMO,

Thank you for sharing your experience with us. We appreciate your kind words about our service, location and team members, but we are truly sorry to hear that you were not satisfied with our price. We understand that price is an important factor and while prices vary depending on demand and seasonality, we always strive to deliver an experience that lives up to the expectations of a five-star stay. We also regret any inconvenience caused by the Executive Lounge's operating hours not being clearly communicated prior to your arrival. Transparency is key and we will look into how we can better present this information to future guests.

Again thank you for your feedback, it is invaluable and we hope to have the opportunity to better meet your expectations. 

Kind regards,
Hilton Saigon

reviews.title: Annual business trip to Vietnam.
reviews.text: I stayed at a hotel during my annual business trip to Vietnam. The location in District 1 of Ho Chi Minh City is perfect, within walking distance to Dong Khoi and Le Thanh Ton. There are convenient Japanese restaurants, a Japanese department store, and supermarkets in the vicinity. There are also many spas that can accommodate Japanese speakers, making it a great hotel for both travel and business trips. Since it is a new hotel, the gym and pool are equipped with the latest facilities, and the cleanliness is excellent. The rooms are spacious, user-friendly, and wonderful. There was plenty of space to store luggage and enough hangers for clothes, which was helpful. Just be cautious as the shower booth has poor drainage. Since it has just opened, there seem to be few staff, and the timing for room cleaning varied, sometimes coming at 9 AM. If this continues, it might be necessary to request at the front desk when services should be completed before heading out, as Vietnam is hot, and after 2-3 hours of outdoor sightseeing or shopping, you might return to find the room still uncleaned.
reviews.response:
Dear Kaito,

Thank you for your thoughtful review and for choosing Hilton Saigon for your business trips to Vietnam. We’re glad you enjoyed our convenient location in center District 1 and the amenities around that make our hotel ideal for both business and leisure.

It's great to hear that you found the room spacious and appreciated the cleanliness and modern equipment in our gym and pool. However, we apologize for the inconvenience you experienced with the shower drainage and the inconsistency in room cleaning times. We appreciate your feedback and will work on improving these areas. 

We look forward to welcoming you back on your next visit to Ho Chi Minh City!

Warm regards,
Hilton Saigon

reviews.text:
We had a fabulous 2 night stay at Hilton. Though there was an initial hiccup on the water drainage issue which resulted us in having to change room, the rest of the stay was perfect. The service recovery as excellent. The duty manager and staff at all levels communicated well and professionally. 

Special compliments to the breakfast team, chefs and service crew. The spread was great, good selection of both local and international food and drinks. 

The Song Bar was great with good view and drink selection. 

The gym facilities were well maintained and we enjoyed our workout there. 

The best part of the stay was the commanding view of Saigon River, watching the barges sailing by. 


Will certainly stay here again in future.
reviews.response:
Dear Yee,

Thank you for sharing such a wonderful and detailed review of your recent stay at Hilton Saigon.

We’re truly pleased to hear that despite the initial issue with the water drainage, our team was able to resolve it promptly and professionally, allowing you to enjoy the rest of your stay. Your kind recognition of our team means a great deal to us, we will be sure to pass along your compliments.

We’re honored to be your preferred choice in Ho Chi Minh City and look forward to welcoming you back for another memorable stay.

Best regards,
Hilton Saigon

reviews.title: There were some important delegates that stayed at our hotel and it made our stay very inconvenient and uncomfortable.
reviews.negatives:
There were some important delegates that stayed at our hotel and it made our stay very inconvenient and uncomfortable. 

We booked this hotel so it would be convenient for our family but we got the opposite experience. If we knew prior, we would be inconvenient we wouldn’t have paid and stayed at this hotel. 

First off, we couldn’t use the front of the hotel because it was blocked off by the police. So we often had to walk a block or two away to get picked up and be dropped off by Grab. 

Second, we had to go through security to go in and out of the hotel. We didn’t book this hotel to be screened to go in and out of the hotel we paid for. 

Third, the elevator. It takes so long to go up and down the hotel. When the “important delegates” are arriving and leaving the hotel we had to use a different elevator to go up and down as they are using it. 

Next time, if there were any important delegates that will be using and maximising the hotel they should just booked out the entire hotel so they don’t cause inconvenience for the other guests who are staying at hotel. 

This could’ve been managed well to suit the important delegates and other hotel guests.

reviews.title: Value for money at a great location.
reviews.text:
The hotel stay was excellent overall — beautifully maintained property, clean and spacious rooms, and great amenities. The housekeeping and restaurant staff were particularly attentive and friendly, which really enhanced the experience.

One small downside was the check-in process. The front desk staff were quite persistent in upselling room upgrades and breakfast options, which felt a bit pushy after a long journey. While I understand it's part of their job, a softer approach would have made for a more welcoming first impression.

That said, the rest of the stay more than made up for it. I’d still highly recommend the hotel and would return in the future.
reviews.response:
Dear Yvonne,

Thank you for your thoughtful and balanced feedback.

We’re truly delighted to hear that you had an excellent stay overall and appreciated the cleanliness, spacious rooms, and the care provided by our housekeeping and restaurant teams. It's wonderful to know that their attentiveness helped elevate your experience.

At the same time, we sincerely apologize if the check-in process felt overly persistent. While we aim to offer guests added value through available options, we understand that after a long journey, a more gentle and welcoming approach is key. Your comments are well noted and will be shared with our Front Office leadership for refinement in service delivery.

We truly appreciate your kind recommendation and look forward to welcoming you back for another memorable stay in the future.

Best regards,
Hilton Saigon

A special shoutout to Quyên, who was incredibly helpful, kind, and professional. He went above and beyond to assist me and made the experience even better.

If you’re visiting Ho Chi Minh City, I highly recommend Hilton Saigon. It’s a perfect blend of luxury, comfort, and hospitality. Can’t wait to return!

reviews.title: My stay at Hilton Saigon was truly enjoyable, with exceptional service, delightful food, and a level of care that has se
reviews.positives:
Wonderful stay at Hilton Saigon!

I had a very pleasant, truly enjoyable stay at Hilton Saigon. It has become a new reference for my future vacations and visits to Vietnam. If only I could have a Hilton Saigon in every major city I wish to visit!

I’d like to give a special mention to the reception staff, who were always attentive and caring during every moment of our comings and goings throughout the hotel. If there’s one thing that truly stood out, it’s the impeccable communication of the hotel and the outstanding service at reception. Incredible service overall, but everything was simply perfect.

The hotel lounge was fantastic, and the food was exceptional. Whether it was the rooftop restaurant or the delicious scones during tea time, everything was simply magnificent.

reviews.title: The most dissatisfying Hilton hotel I've ever stayed at
reviews.text: I stayed in a room with a river view. The room was spacious and comfortable. The staff was friendly. However, when I checked in, there was someone else's poop on the toilet seat. In fact, this experience was shocking because I have never experienced this at other Hiltons or other hotels. When I called the hotel about this issue, the hotel came and cleaned it up. No one apologized or offered any other alternatives. They were friendly and smiling, but I don't know if it is right to laugh about this issue. I am Korean. Usually, when this happens in Korea, the manager apologizes and changes the room or offers additional benefits such as hotel restaurant coupons, but at the Ho Chi Minh Hilton, there was no apology or other compensation until I checked out. I think this is the culture of the Ho Chi Minh Hilton. I never want to stay at this hotel again.

reviews.title: Incredible and magical stay, would highly recommend
reviews.positives:
Great location, very central. The breakfast was amazing! We received a free upgrade on arrival to a suite, and it had an incredible view of the river and city from the 25th floor! The staff were extremely helpful, especially the Manager and staff at breakfast, the staff at check in, and Buu the bellman, and the concierge Duc.
I used the gym, steam room and sauna and the pool, all of which was great.
I would definitely recommend and would like to stay here again.
reviews.negatives: Nothing. I could not fault anything.
